sentences: aaj ka mausam bahut achha hai.
main har subah chai peeta hoon.
bacche paark mein khel rahe hain.
kitaab padhna ek achhi aadat hai.
woh har roz school jaata hai.
hamaara desh bahut sundar hai.
sooraj har subah ugta hai.
paani jeevan ke liye zaroori hai.
woh apna kaam man lagaakar karta hai.
aam ka swaad bahut meetha hota hai.
mere ghar mein ek bada bagicha hai.
woh hamesha samay par aata hai.
dosti ek anamol rishta hai.
baarish mein bheegna bahut achha lagta hai.
gaay hamein doodh deti hai.
padhaai mein mehnat karna zaroori hai.
har insaan ko sach bolna chahiye.
baazaar mein bahut bheed thi.
nadi ka paani saaf aur thanda tha.
meri maa bahut achha khaana banati hai.
sardiyoon mein garm kapde pehnne chahiye.
aakaash mein taare bahut sundar dikhte hain.
woh har din ek ghante vyayaam karta hai.
gaana sunne se mann khush hota hai.
ped-paudhe hawaa ko saaf rakhte hain.
hamein apne badon ka sammaan karna chahiye.
sheher mein yaataayaat bahut adhik hai.
woh har saal pahad ghoomne jaata hai.
soorayaast ka nazaaraa bahut khoobasoorat tha.
usne mujhe ek sundar upahaar diya.
jungle mein bahut saare jaanwar rahte hain.
bharat ek vividhtaaon se bhara desh hai.
aaj baazaar mein bahut chahl-pahl thi.
mehnat karne wala insaan kabhi nahin haarta.
bachon ko meethi neend aati hai.
roz subah uthkar vyayaam karna faaydemand hai.
uski muskaan bahut pyaari lagti hai.
khelkood se shareer swasth rehta hai.
hum sab milkar kaam karen to kuch bhi mushkil nahin.
achhi neend sehat ke liye bahut zaroori hai.
